title: Communications Between City Manager Eric Linton and Flock Safety

communications.subject: Georgia Open Records Act Request: Communications Between City Manager Eric Linton and Flock Safety
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All communications — including text messages, iMessages, emails, voicemails, call logs, and any other written or electronic correspondence — between City Manager Eric Linton and any Flock Safety employee, officer, representative, or agent, from January 1, 2026 through April 30, 2026.

If any records are withheld, please provide a specific written explanation for each withholding.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jason Hunyar

title: Communications Between Mayor and Flock Safety Regarding Contract Data and AI Training Language

communications.subject: Georgia Open Records Act Request: Communications Between Mayor and Flock Safety Regarding Contract Data and AI Training Language
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All communications — including text messages, iMessages, emails, voicemails, call logs, and any other written or electronic correspondence — between the Mayor of Dunwoody and City Manager Eric Linton regarding Flock Safety contract terms, specifically any language related to customer data use for AI training or product development, from January 1, 2026 through April 30, 2026.


If any records are withheld, please provide a specific written explanation for each withholding.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jason Hunyar

title: Communications Between Mayor and Flock Safety CEO Garrett Langley

communications.subject: Georgia Open Records Act Request: Communications Between Mayor and Flock Safety CEO Garrett Langley
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All communications — including text messages, iMessages, emails, voicemails, call logs, and any other written or electronic correspondence — between the Mayor of Dunwoody and Garrett Langley, CEO of Flock Safety, from April 1, 2026 through April 30, 2026.

Please include records from all devices and accounts used for city business, as Georgia law requires. If any records are withheld, please provide a specific written explanation for each withholding.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jason Hunyar

title: ALPR funding for Weehawken, NJ (Department of Homeland Security)

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: ALPR funding for Weehawken, NJ (Department of Homeland Security)
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Any documents related to applications by or grants to the Township of Weehawken, NJ related to feasibility studies, purchase, installation, or operation of automated license plate reading systems.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Albert M Berg
